positive: A mystical, stylized forest creature (like a phoenix fox or celestial stag) emerging from a cosmic nebula background. The silhouette must be clean and highly detailed, rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and vibrant gold accents. Use bioluminescent detailing and ornate mandalas incorporated into the animal's fur/body for an ethereal, powerful look. The composition should be central and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Art style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets sacred geometry, highly contrasted, volumetric lighting, illustration quality, vector art texture.
negative: blur, fuzzy, distorted, watermark, text, signature, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, ugly, deformed, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, lowres, grayscale, muted colors, realistic photo
